title: Resume
text:
Professional Summary
      Motivated student with strong interest in marketing, with skills in social media strategy, project coordination, design, and promotional activities. Experienced in employed and self-employed jobs as well as through connections and eager to contribute to companies through possible internship opportunities in order to further grow skills.

      Experience
      
      Associate | In-N-Out
      Pomona • 12/2022 - Current
      
        Operated point-of-sale system efficiently during peak hours.
        Trained new associates on store operations, policies, and procedures.
        Assisted in inventory management by restocking supplies as needed.
        Built relationships with customers by providing friendly customer service.
        Managed multiple tasks simultaneously while maintaining attention to detail.
        Work in Rscript, Python, and data analytics through Google.
      

      Self Employed Services | Automotive Customization
      Chino, California • 02/2022 - Current
      
        Provide wraps, interior customization, and installations while advertising to gain new clients.
        Collaborated closely with team members to achieve project objectives and meet deadlines.
        Prioritized and organized tasks to efficiently accomplish service goals.
      

      Sales Associate | America's Tire
      Chino, California • 06/2022 - 09/2022
      
        Assisted customers in selecting appropriate tires and services.
        Maintained inventory levels and organized stock in the sales area.
        Addressed customer inquiries and resolved issues effectively and professionally.
      

      Flooring Sales Specialist | Sam's Club
      Chino • 08/2021 - 05/2022
      
        Demonstrated product features and benefits to enhance customer understanding.
        Managed inventory levels and organized displays for optimal presentation.
        Trained new staff on product knowledge and sales techniques for floor products.
        Supported promotional activities to boost product visibility and engagement.
      

      Education
      Associate of Arts and Sciences: Business Administration
      Chaffey College, Rancho Cucamonga, CA • 05/2025
      
      Marketing Management: Business
      California State Polytechnic University, Pomona, CA

title: About Me
text:
Professional Journey
  I am a dedicated professional with a passion for leveraging data to drive strategic marketing decisions. My journey has been defined by a commitment to mastering the technical tools of data science while maintaining a sharp focus on business objectives.

  Technical Expertise
  My analytical toolkit is anchored in R Programming, where I specialize in:
  
    Data Manipulation: Expert use of the Tidyverse for complex wrangling.
    Statistical Modeling: Developing predictive models and trend analyses.
    Visualization: Creating high-impact graphics with ggplot2 and interactive Revealjs decks.
    Reporting: Building automated, reproducible reports with Quarto.
  

  Marketing Analytics
  As a Google Analytics 4 (GA4) Certified professional, I bridge the gap between technical data and marketing performance. I specialize in:
  
    Tracking and measuring the customer journey.
    Optimizing marketing campaigns through data-driven insights.
    Implementing advanced GA4 configurations and micro-applications.
  

  Academic Foundation
  My academic work, reflected in my coursework and reflections, focuses on the theoretical underpinnings of data science. I believe that a strong conceptual foundation is essential for innovative problem-solving in the professional world.
